title: Delicious Crunchy Russian Seeds Pilaf
description: Fresh, gooey, and adventurous Russian dish featuring seeds, leaf-wrap-steam, and Mediterranean-friendly flavors.
instructions: Wrap a large leaf of collard green around a square of cheesecloth or a clean cotton cloth.
Gather the edges of the leaf together to form a tight bundle.
Tie the bundle with kitchen twine to secure it.
Place the bundle in a steamer basket over boiling water.
Steam for 25 minutes, or until the quinoa is tender.
Remove the bundle from the steamer and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Fluff the quinoa with a fork to separate the grains.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic.
Pour the dressing over the quinoa and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds, sunflower seeds, and poppy seeds over the quinoa.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill, if desired.
